subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Verily Thou, Thou art my Love; my remembrance is of Thee alone, Thou art, Thou art; and Thy remembrance of me is Thy Word, it is that it is. How can I turn my face unto Thee with the countenance of Thy Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. رب انک انت انت حبی ایاک و ذکری انت انت و ذکرک ایای هو قولک هو هو کیف اتوجه الیک بوجهة فردانیتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @love of God
